mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM BoardComment WHERE BoardNo=#{BoardNo} OR ImageNo=#{ImageNo} START WITH CommentUpperNo = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR CommentNo = CommentUpperNo ORDER SIBLINGS BY CommentGroupNo DESC ) A ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN ${rowStart} AND ${rowEnd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BoardComment( CommentNo , UserId , CommentContent , CommentDate , CommentGroupNo , CommentUpperNo , CommentIndent , ImageNo , BoardNo) VALUES( Comment_SEQ.NEXTVAL , #{UserId} , #{CommentContent} , sysdate , Comment_SEQ.NEXTVAL , 0 , 0 , #{ImageNo} , #{BoardNo} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BoardComment WHERE BoardNo=#{BoardNo} OR ImageNo=#{ImageNo}
